What We Do

Four specialties. One standard.

From first concept to final hand-over, we take on projects that reward careful carpentry and genuine project management.

01

Renovations

Kitchens, bathrooms and full-home refurbs that respect the original bones while delivering modern liveability.

02

Extensions

Second storeys, rear additions and granny flats — thoughtfully integrated with the existing home.

03

New Builds

Custom homes built from the slab up, with a focus on craft, durability and coastal-ready detailing.

04

Project Management

End-to-end coordination of trades, scheduling and budget — so your build actually runs to plan.

Selected Work

Recent builds & renovations

A look across our current portfolio — from luxury coastal homes to considered bathroom renovations.

See more on Instagram
How We Work

A clear path, start to finish.

No surprises, no radio silence. Every project follows the same straightforward process.

Step 01

Chat & Site Visit

A free, no-pressure conversation on site — we listen, ask questions and understand exactly what you're after.

Step 02

Detailed Quote

You receive a clear, itemised quote — no vague line items, no hidden extras later down the track.

Step 03

Build & Manage

We coordinate all trades, handle scheduling and keep you updated every week of the build.

Step 04

Hand-over

A final walk-through, full clean, and a completion that you actually feel proud to live in.

From Our Clients
